description: ACE Framework Skill Registry - Centralized skill ID definitions for reflection tracking

orphan-field-dependency-cross-reference.description: For fields not on any layout, check (1) Analytics API report describe for field references in recently-modified reports, (2) Tooling API for [COMPANY] XML field references, (3) ValidationRule formulas, (4) WorkflowRule references. Produces safe-to-delete vs has-dependencies classification.

fireflies-transcript-action-item-extract.description: Use Fireflies GraphQL API to fetch meeting summaries and action items, then cross-reference with org state to identify deployment gaps

fireflies-transcript-to-action-item-veri.displayName: Fireflies transcript to action item verification
fireflies-transcript-to-action-item-veri.description: Pull meeting transcripts via Fireflies GraphQL API, extract action items, then systematically verify each against live Salesforce org state using sfdc-state-discovery. Produces a gap analysis showing prepared-but-undeployed, not-started, and completed items.

strategy-first-okr-framing.description: When generating OKRs, require company strategy doc as primary input before platform data collection. Platform metrics serve as evidence for strategic priorities, not the starting point for theme selection.

iterative-dedup-methodology-refinement.description: Run dedup → analyze distribution (name groups, domain groups, address coverage) → adjust safety thresholds → re-run → spot-check with user → iterate. Three rounds (1→18→175 clusters) validated the approach.

modeled-production-stakeholder-book-anal.description: Overlay validated sandbox classification and territory logic onto live production Account and Opportunity data to forecast stakeholder-book impact before promotion.

okr-data-dictionary-appendix-generator.description: After generating OKR baselines, produce a human-readable appendix showing field names, queries, conditions, and data sources for each KR

hubspot-dual-endpoint-workflow-discovery.description: Use v4 for complete enumeration + v3 for accurate enabled status; merge by workflow ID

parallel-assessment-phase-execution.description: Run independent assessment phases (e.g., deal velocity + field usage) in parallel with run_in_background, refresh token before launch

validation-rule-bulk-audit-via-hybrid-ap.description: Use Tooling API for inventory enumeration (names, active status, error messages), then Metadata API via parent CustomObject retrieval for formulas. Cross-check counts. Parse XML with [COMPANY] for structured analysis.

report-filter-impact-quantification.description: When a data change (backfill, automation) is suspected of impacting pipeline reports, fetch the report describe API, extract filter logic, and cross-reference against the changed records to quantify exact impact in dollar terms.

tolerance-based-error-analysis.description: After initial reconciliation, apply user-defined tolerances (date proximity, convention-only changes) to distinguish material errors from acceptable variance. Use regex-based FY/year extraction to detect semantic mismatches within name fields.

ocr-lifecycle-stage-impact-analysis.description: When auto-creating OpportunityContactRole records, audit DLRS rollups on OCR, flows on OCR, Contact flows triggered by OCR-derived fields, and Process Builders to confirm no cascade to lifecycle stage fields

metadata-api-dashboard-xml-inspection.description: Retrieve dashboard XML via sf project retrieve start --metadata Dashboard and parse <dashboardType> for definitive running user classification

multi-angle-form-investigation.description: Search for forms from multiple angles: form name keywords, thank-you page URLs, smart list references, and program associations. Cross-reference findings to build confidence.

hook-impact-analysis.description: When removing hooks, document: (1) what it did, (2) what problem it solved, (3) impact of removal, (4) workarounds available

hour-level-date-distribution.description: For small median date offsets (<1 day), analyze at hour level to identify bimodal patterns (same-event vs historical)

flow-complexity-routing.description: Check flow line count and complexity before deployment; route to appropriate approach (direct, segmented, or UI)

client-handoff-documentation-generation.description: Generate markdown with Executive Summary, Schema (ERD), Permission Model, User Access Matrix, Testing Results, Rollback Procedure sections. Filter internal consultant users. Render diagrams to images. Export as landscape PDF.

handoff-document-generation.description: Generate standardized deployment handoff documents with Executive Summary, Schema, Permission Model, Testing Results, Rollback Procedure sections

flow-dependent-sharing-rule-deployment.description: When sharing rules depend on field values populated by flows, must trigger flows on existing records after deployment to sync [SFDC_ID]

dependent-picklist-valuesettings-merge.description: Before deploying dependent picklist field-meta.xml, scan for duplicate valueName entries across separate valueSettings blocks and merge them into single blocks with multiple controllingFieldValue entries.

free-email-domain-qualification-filter.description: Load 6,100+ free/disposable email domains from community gist, combine with custom additions, apply as ICP disqualification filter

non-us-country-detection-and-sam-disqual.displayName: Non-US Country Detection and SAM Disqualification
non-us-country-detection-and-sam-disqual.description: TLD-to-country mapping + content-based keyword detection + ISO code normalization for geographic qualification

free-email-domain-qualification.description: Load 6,100+ domains from community gist, combine with user additions, apply as disqualification filter

bulk-job-status-verification.description: When sf data upsert bulk returns non-zero exit code, GET /services/data/v62.0/jobs/ingest/{jobId} to check actual state, numberRecordsProcessed, numberRecordsFailed

territory-exclusion-audit.description: Cross-reference Territory2ObjectExclusion records against active rule criteria to identify stale or incorrect exclusions blocking legitimate territory assignments.

asana-board-reconciliation-before-batch-.displayName: Asana Board Reconciliation Before Batch Create
asana-board-reconciliation-before-batch-.description: Before creating tasks from a plan, fetch all existing project tasks, fuzzy-match names, and update existing rather than creating duplicates

formula-field-pre-flight-guard.description: Before generating Bulk API upload CSVs, query Tooling API CustomField for [COMPANY]=true to exclude formula fields from upload columns

tooling-api-field-verification.description: Use SELECT Id, DeveloperName FROM CustomField WHERE... via Tooling API to verify field deployment instead of sf sobject describe which has cache delays

post-deploy-field-count-verification-gat.description: After every metadata deploy that includes custom fields, run sf sobject describe and compare expected vs actual custom field count. Block downstream batches if mismatch detected.

flow-runtime-smoke-test.description: After deploying and activating flows, create a minimal test record to trigger each flow and verify the expected field mutation occurred. Flow activation success does NOT prove field references are valid.

vr-pre-activation-field-existence-check.description: Before activating any validation rule, parse its formula for __c field references and confirm each exists in the org via describe API. Prevents deadlock conditions where VR references non-existent fields.

field-reference-cross-validation.description: After multi-batch deployment, extract field references from active flows and VRs, cross-reference against sobject describe, and flag orphaned references before functional testing begins.

vr-deadlock-detection.description: Detect validation rules whose formulas reference non-existent fields, creating impossible-to-satisfy conditions that block record saves.

compound-state-name-disambiguation.description: When matching US state names, filter out pairs where one name is a substring of another to prevent false positives

territory-association-drift-validator.description: Detect duplicate or conflicting Territory2 rule associations that break expected assignment outcomes after territory changes.

formula-parenthesis-audit.description: When adding nested IF branches to formula fields, always recount open vs close parentheses. Pattern: each new IF adds 1 open paren, trailing close parens should equal total IFs + inner expressions.

backfill-benchmark-validation.description: Run backfill dry-run against production, compare calculated values to known-good Account records before executing. Provides high-confidence validation without modifying data.

plan-to-routing-compliance-mapper.description: Before executing a prescriptive plan, parse each step and map it against CLAUDE.md routing table to identify which agents must be invoked. Flag any steps that match mandatory routing but lack agent delegation.

live-data-correction-of-agent-estimates.displayName: Live Data Correction of Agent Estimates
live-data-correction-of-agent-estimates.description: After agent produces sample-based estimates, run data collector scripts and patch assessment files with verified live counts

property-association-schema-validation-s.description: 8-test validation suite for bifurcated junction object schemas: field existence, distribution checks, cross-tab analysis, rollup verification, null checks, and SAM/TAM dedup validation.

lead-email-dedup-pre-flight.description: Before creating new Leads, query existing unconverted Leads by email. Split matches into Lead updates vs truly new Leads.

territory-orphan-detection.description: Before removing manual territory assignments, cross-reference accounts to identify those whose only Primary Territory source is the assignment being removed. Check handler routing logic (DS/FM/SGA prefixes) to predict which remaining OTA records will populate Primary Territory.

corporate-hierarchy-detection-in-dedup.description: Before merge, compare employee counts and Description fields across accounts to detect parent/subsidiary relationships that should override activity-based survivor selection.

cpq-renewal-linkage-bulk-audit.description: When a second instance of the same CPQ data integrity issue is found in the same org, escalate from individual record repair to org-wide audit. Run: SELECT COUNT() FROM SBQQ__Quote__c WHERE SBQQ__Type__c = 'Renewal' AND SBQQ__MasterContract__c = null to scope the problem before fixing individual records.

flow-regression-detection.description: When a client iterates on a flow we previously fixed (v5 fix lost in v8), compare current active version against our last-deployed version to detect regression of defensive guards.

cpq-bundle-integrity-validation.description: For bundle child records (quote lines and subscriptions): verify (1) Bundle flag = false, (2) ProductOption is populated and belongs to the correct parent bundle's ConfiguredSKU, (3) RequiredBy/RequiredById points to a valid parent, (4) product on the line matches the ProductOption's OptionalSKU

post-merge-customer-impact-assessment.description: After Account merges, identify groups where Customer/Former Customer accounts were merged as non-survivors into Prospect survivors. Compare 40+ customer-specific writable fields between backup and live state, classify into RESTORE/SKIP/FLAG_CONFLICT, and tier by urgency (active customer vs former customer vs questionable merge).

loose-list-detection-and-fix.description: Scan markdown for blank lines between consecutive bullet points and remove them before PDF generation to prevent spacing issues

pdf-html-tag-balance-validator.description: Count open/close div tags in generated TOC/cover HTML before passing to md-to-pdf renderer. Prevents styling leaks from unclosed containers.

flow-assignment-order-auditor.description: Parse Flow XML to detect premature collection Add operations in assignment elements, where sObject fields are assigned after the Add snapshot

gong-text-field-sanitization.description: Apply html.unescape() + regex HTML tag stripping to all Gong__Call_*__c text fields before rendering to markdown/PDF. Gong stores rich text with [COMPANY] encoding in Salesforce long text fields.

post-merge-deletion-verification.description: After merge, query non-survivor WITHOUT --all-rows flag. If record returns, merge failed. Never rely on Apex debug output or sf apex run exit code as merge confirmation.

parallel-agent-team-reconciliation.description: Use TeamCreate with 2+ general-purpose agents running in parallel to reconcile different object types from a shared CSV against live SFDC. Each agent writes its own script, queries SFDC, and outputs a reconciliation CSV. Lead agent merges results.

state/country-picklist-detection-and-han.description: Before bulk address updates, check if BillingStateCode field exists via describe. If yes, use BillingStateCode (2-letter codes) instead of BillingState (full names) to avoid FIELD_INTEGRITY_EXCEPTION.

cron-path-validator.description: Before deploying any new cron job, simulate execution with minimal PATH to verify all CLIs resolve

backfill-data-validation.description: Export pre-backfill snapshots, execute backfill, export post-backfill data, run automated comparison to verify no pre-existing values were overwritten

cumulative-stage-gate-vr-pattern.description: Use CASE() ordinal mapping with >= threshold to enforce cumulative field requirements across stage progression. Pair with [COMPANY](ISPICKVAL(StageName, 'Closed Lost')) to allow closing lost from any stage.

pdf-template-visual-verification.description: After PDF generation, use Playwright to open the PDF and screenshot specific pages (cover, diagrams) for visual verification before delivering to client

toc-div-balance-verification.description: Count <div and </div occurrences in generated TOC HTML, assert equality. If unbalanced, generate flat [COMPANY] without toc-group nesting.

large-dataset-pre-flight-estimation.description: Before running any batch processing tool against large datasets (>[N] records), calculate estimated time = records / batch_size / rate_per_minute and present to user for confirmation

sample-first-validation.description: Run processing tool against a small sample (500-[N] records) first to validate pipeline and output quality before committing to full dataset processing

flow-race-condition-detection-via-bulk-d.displayName: Flow Race Condition Detection via Bulk DML Stress Test
flow-race-condition-detection-via-bulk-d.description: Use Anonymous Apex to update N records in a single DML, then count created related records. If count > 1 for a record that should be unique, the flow has a race condition on the Create Records element.

attribution-field-adoption-monitor.description: Query COUNT() of attribution lookup fields across Lead/Contact/Opportunity to assess post-deployment adoption rates. Compare populated vs total records and check for recent activity timestamps.

dark-agent-detection.description: Compare set of all agents in routing index against set of agents reachable via byKeyword reverse lookup. Any agent not in the reachable set is 'dark' - unreachable by the router regardless of user prompt.

picklist-formula-text()-wrapper-pattern.description: When building Salesforce formula fields that reference picklist fields, always wrap in TEXT() for equality comparisons. Deploy error message: 'Picklist fields are only supported in certain functions.'

wsl2-csv-line-ending-normalization.description: When generating CSVs on WSL2 for Salesforce Bulk API, always use explicit LF line endings in Python csv.writer. Verify with file command before upload.

short-name-sfdc-matching-guard.description: For company names under 5 characters, require exact SOQL match instead of fuzzy/substring to prevent false positives

territory-rule-county-validation.description: Compare territory rule Utility_County_Name__c contains values against ca-county-mapping.json to detect missing counties

partner-stats-dry-run-comparison.description: Run read-only aggregation queries against Opportunity data, compare with current Account stats, categorize changes (new/stale/correct), present impact summary before any writes

asana-project-membership-verification.description: After searching tasks with sections_any, always verify memberships.project.gid matches target project ID using get_multiple_tasks_by_gid with opt_fields=memberships.project.gid

reference-report-back-calculation-valida.description: Back-calculate formula parameters from published report figures (e.g., Total/Avg/Reps=days) to verify methodology before full data pull

soql-query-truncation-detection.description: Always compare returned record count against totalSize to detect silent truncation at 50,000 record limit

claude-code-hook-schema-validation.description: Validate hook types against known valid list, validate matchers as regex, check for common glob-to-regex conversion needs

pdf-diagram-verification.description: After PDF generation, verify: 1) File size is appropriate, 2) Mermaid diagram count matches source, 3) Cover template is correct branded version

backup-verification-cross-check.description: Before deletion, sample deletion candidate IDs and verify they exist in backup file

post-upload-audit-generation.description: Generate comprehensive audit CSV from SF bulk job result files after data upload

think-first-validation.description: Before executing any plan or user instruction involving file paths, explore the actual codebase structure and validate assumptions

duplicate-account-detection.description: Identify potential duplicate accounts by matching on name patterns, abbreviations, and domain overlap

territory2-sync-validation.description: Compare ObjectTerritory2Association counts against Account.Primary_Territory2_Name__c to detect stale data

territory-source-validation.description: Cross-reference assignment source files against User object before bulk operations, generating reconciliation report

opportunity-owner-preservation.description: Verify opportunity owners remain unchanged after account owner updates using sample comparison and count verification

ownership-change-verification.description: Calculate MD5 hash of sorted OwnerId column before and after changes to verify no unintended modifications

user-name-fuzzy-matching.description: Query Salesforce User object and perform fuzzy matching against source names to resolve spelling variations like Phil/Philip, Max/Maxwell, Robert/Robb

field-limit-pre-flight-check.description: Query object field count and deleted fields before deploying new custom fields to prevent limit errors

pre-implementation-state-verification.description: Before executing any implementation plan, query the org to identify what components already exist. Report delta and only deploy net-new items.

flow-picklist-formula-validation.description: Flow filterFormula elements that compare picklist fields must use TEXT() wrapper. Pattern: TEXT({!$Record.PicklistField}) = 'Value'

territory-structure-comparison.description: Compare territory structures between orgs before replication to identify existing matches

orphaned-flow-decision-detection.description: Check Flow decision branches for null connectors that indicate incomplete logic paths

territory-name-comparison-matrix.description: Create structured comparison table mapping external documentation territory names to Salesforce Territory2 records, categorizing discrepancies by type (suffix missing, formatting, structural)

field-population-pre-flight-check.description: Before executing queries with filters, check population rates for filter fields and warn if below threshold

automation-audit-self-verification.description: When audit claims 'API limitations', challenge by exploring runbooks/scripts for existing extractors before accepting the limitation

originating-opportunity-linkage-verifica.description: Query all Closed Won opportunities and verify ContractId is populated

contract-term-reconciliation.description: Compare spreadsheet contract dates against Salesforce Contract records, fix StartDate/EndDate/ContractTerm, create missing renewals with correct Renewal_Type__c

closed-won/lost-deletion-guard.description: Before ANY deletion operation, verify StageName NOT IN ('Closed Won', 'Closed Lost'). Historical records must never be deleted regardless of amount or apparent junk status.

bdu-checkin-protected-deletion.description: Query BDU_Checkin__c records before Opportunity deletion; block if records exist

financial-value-comparison-before-delete.description: Compare Expected_Renewal__c and QuotedAmount__c between duplicate candidates before deciding which to delete

government-entity-abbreviation-normaliza.description: Expand common government/law enforcement abbreviations (PD→Police Department, SO→Sheriff's Office, DA→District Attorney) before fuzzy matching

ds-territory-gap-detection.description: Query accounts with BillingState != null AND DS_Territory2_Id__c = null, then GROUP BY BillingState to identify mapping gaps

license-capacity-pre-check.description: Check license availability before user creation to avoid failed provisioning

new-hire-protection.description: Flag recently created accounts (< 30 days) in deactivation candidate lists to prevent accidental new hire deactivation

subflow-compatibility-check.description: Query [SFDC_ID].TriggerType before updating subflow references - null means callable, non-null means record-triggered (not callable)

picklist-value-api-lookup.description: Use sf sobject describe to get picklist API values vs labels before mapping flow choices

ui-verification-checkpoint.description: Before concluding any audit, verify 2-3 critical findings in platform UI

deployment-time-field-assertion-avoidanc.description: When deploying new fields and Apex classes together, test assertions should verify execution completes (not field values) since fields may not exist during validation

scope-alignment-verification.description: When user provides a data source (CSV), explicitly confirm query scope matches before execution

live-state-verification.description: Always query live Salesforce org for entity status before reporting, compare against documentation if available

industry-segment-compatibility-validatio.description: Check Industry values against Segment2__c whitelist (government segments should only have government-related Industries), then drill into Sub_Segment__c for edge case detection (university police, hospital EMS, fire marshals)

entity-name-keyword-override.description: When Industry assignment based on keywords (University→Higher Education), check for override keywords (Hospital, Medical Center→Healthcare) that should take precedence

merge-pre-flight-validation.description: Before Account merges, validate: (1) dependent picklist values against controlling field, (2) shared ACR contacts, (3) unique field collisions

state-prefix-validation.description: Cross-reference account Name state prefix against US county database and BillingState field to identify data entry errors

restricted-picklist-validation.description: Compare source system picklist values against SF restricted picklist to identify character-level mismatches

post-batch-territory-validation.description: After running PrimaryTerritorySyncBatch, query for orphaned accounts (territory assignment but null Primary Territory) and generate fix file

dependent-picklist-pre-flight-check.description: Before updating any picklist field, query field describe to check for controlling fields and ensure controlling value is set appropriately

address-format-detection.description: Before bulk address updates, query existing field values to detect format (abbreviations vs full names) and map input data accordingly

territory-rule-state-verification.description: After modifying territory rules, query IsActive, BooleanFilter, and item SortOrder alignment before reporting success

field-name-transformation-for-territory-.displayName: Field Name Transformation for Territory Rules
field-name-transformation-for-territory-.description: Transform XML field names (e.g., Segment2__c) to REST API format (Account.Segment2__c) before creating ObjectTerritory2AssignmentRuleItem records

territory2-rule-separation-detection.description: Parse ruleAssociations from Territory2 XML to identify rules that require separate creation when using Data API deployment path

zero-impact-ownership-validation.description: Before deployments that could affect record ownership: 1) Capture baseline Account.OwnerId distribution, 2) Perform deployment, 3) Re-query ownership distribution, 4) Compare and fail if any changes detected. Provides mathematical proof of zero ownership impact for compliance/audit purposes.

csv-line-ending-normalization.description: Always run dos2unix or --line-ending LF flag for bulk operations on WSL-generated files

province-to-city-validation.description: Flag records where BillingCity matches province names/abbreviations as data quality issues

territory2-verification-without-activati.description: Verify Territory2 structure in Planning state by checking: (1) No Account.OwnerId changes, (2) No AccountTeamMember changes, (3) Territory2 records queryable, (4) Assignment rules created with correct associations. This allows safe validation before activation.

phone-extraction-from-notes.description: Extract phone numbers from freeform text fields using regex patterns, normalize to 10 digits, cross-reference against existing Account phones for additional matching

b2b-person-matching-with-organization-ve.displayName: B2B Person Matching with Organization Verification
b2b-person-matching-with-organization-ve.description: For B2B data matching, combine person name similarity (60%) with organization name similarity (40%), applying heavy penalty when organization doesn't match

command-vs-agent-detection.description: Scan commands/ directories to build registry, check against registry before Task tool invocation, return helpful error with correct invocation method

flow-entry-criteria-analysis.description: Analyze flow <start> element for missing filterLogic/filters that could cause cascade failures on unrelated records

data-source-completeness-validation.description: Compare client-provided export record count against live database count before analysis

company-name-fuzzy-matching.description: Multi-strategy matching with length-aware thresholds and stopword filtering

suffix-aware-fuzzy-matching.description: Strip common domain suffixes (Correctional Facility, Correctional Center, Prison, etc.) before fuzzy comparison to prevent false positives

city-state-blocking-with-name-similarity.description: Block candidates by geographic proximity (city/state), then apply name similarity within blocks to reduce comparison space while maintaining accuracy

dependent-picklist-chain-validation.description: When debugging picklist errors, trace entire dependency chain (Market > Segment > Sub-Segment > Sub-Type) and validate each level's constraints

working-script-discovery.description: Before using Task agent for PDF/report generation, check target directory for existing *.js generation scripts that may have project-specific styling

flexipage-facet-orphan-detection.description: Compare facet definitions (flexiPageRegions with type=Facet) against facet references (value=Facet-xxx) to find orphans

website-url-normalization-for-dedup.description: Before duplicate matching, normalize website URLs by stripping https://, http://, www. prefixes and trailing slashes to catch duplicates with minor formatting differences

classification-confidence-scoring.description: Categorize accounts by HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW confidence based on keyword patterns, show examples before bulk updates, only auto-update HIGH confidence

audit-result-sanity-check.description: If automation audit returns 0 items across all objects, treat as suspect and suggest manual verification or Tooling API retry

flow-xml-api-version-validation.description: Before deploying screen flows, retrieve current org version and validate local XML for API version compatibility issues

validation-rule-field-type-detection.description: Iteratively test formula field types via dry-run deployment to detect multiselect (no TEXT), regular picklist (needs TEXT), and text fields (no TEXT wrapper)

a4-safe-chart-dimensions.description: Limit matplotlib chart width to 7.5 inches for A4 portrait PDFs with margins

system-managed-field-detection.description: Before any bulk import, check field.createable and field.updateable flags to identify system-managed fields that cannot be set via API

hubspot-vid-based-contact-deduplication.description: Always use HubSpot VID (contact.vid) as Map key for deduplication, not email. Email can be used for SF matching but VID is the canonical identifier.

validation-rule-attribute-comparison.description: Extract and compare active, errorMessage, errorDisplayField, and errorConditionFormula between two org retrievals to verify deployment accuracy

lead-assignment-rule-testing-pattern.description: Use Apex with Database.DMLOptions.assignmentRuleHeader to test assignment rules instead of CLI commands

assignment-rule-testing-with-dmloptions.description: Use Database.DMLOptions.assignmentRuleHeader.useDefaultRule = true to trigger assignment rules in Apex; execute tests sequentially to avoid SOQL limits when flows are involved

flow-dropdownbox-output-pattern.description: DropdownBox fields automatically store output in field name - storeOutputAutomatically is invalid

recordcreate-storeoutputautomatically-re.description: When RecordCreate uses storeOutputAutomatically=true, reference as {!ElementName} not {!ElementName.Id}

state-prefix-to-full-state-name-mapping.displayName: State Prefix to Full State Name Mapping
state-prefix-to-full-state-name-mapping.description: Extract 2-letter state prefix from Account.Name, map to full state name for BillingState correction

territory-documentation-verification.description: Always query SFDC directly (Territory2, ObjectTerritory2Association, ObjectTerritory2AssignmentRule) before updating territory documentation to ensure DeveloperNames and account counts are accurate

territory-boolean-filter-validation.description: Before activating territory rules, validate that segmentation filters (Account_Segmentation__c) are in AND position with state filters, not OR position. Pattern: (sector filters) AND (state filters) AND (segmentation filter)

tooling-api-post-deployment-verification.description: Use EntityParticle Tooling API query to verify field creation immediately after deployment, bypassing standard describe cache delay

sfdc-metric-validation-pattern.description: Query SFDC directly with same filters as report, compare each metric type (total, breakdown, per-user), identify discrepancies by systematic comparison

picklist-case-sensitivity-check.description: Before coding string comparisons for SFDC picklist values, always query GROUP BY to get exact values including case

account-contract-deduplication-check.description: Before bulk contract creation, query existing contracts by AccountId to prevent duplicates

territory-rule-association-validation.description: After Territory2Rule deployment, verify RuleTerritory2Association exists by comparing sf org list metadata output against RuleTerritory2Association query

picklist-value-validation.description: Query sf sobject describe to validate user-provided picklist values before creating metadata that references them

field-accessibility-verification.description: Use direct Apex SOQL execution to verify field accessibility rather than Tooling API [SFDC_ID] queries which may return stale/incomplete results

multi-strategy-county-matching.description: Cascade through multiple matching strategies: picklist > agency_county > name_county > city_lookup > name_city > fuzzy

canadian-account-detection-pattern.description: Multi-signal detection of Canadian accounts using: (1) Province prefix in account name (AB:, BC:, ON:, etc.), (2) .ca website domain, (3) .ca contact email domains, (4) BillingState containing Canadian province names
agents: Direct execution with sf data query

field-label-length-pre-validation.description: Before adding prefixes to field labels, calculate final length and identify fields that would exceed 40-character limit. Generate shortened alternatives that preserve prefix and meaningful label content.

duplicate-key-resolution-by-score.description: When multiple records share a unique key, retain record with highest match/confidence score

sf-id-website-detection-pattern.description: Query accounts where Website LIKE '001%.com' OR LIKE '003%.com' OR LIKE '00[a-z]%.com' to detect Salesforce IDs mistakenly used as websites

false-positive-filtering-in-name-based-q.displayName: False Positive Filtering in Name-Based Queries
false-positive-filtering-in-name-based-q.description: When querying by name pattern (e.g., '%Fire%'), identify and exclude false positives like 'Firearms Office' that match pattern but don't belong to target category

flow-decision-condition-review.description: Before deployment, review flow decision conditions to ensure optional field checks (like Contact != null) don't inadvertently skip required field assignments (like Prepared_By__c)

metadata-api-sharing-rule-retrieval.description: Use sf project retrieve --metadata SharingCriteriaRule instead of SOQL query for sharing rule validation

query.description: Skills for building and executing queries

report-create.description: Create Salesforce reports with proper types

data-import.description: Import and upsert data with validation

data-quality-audit.description: Comprehensive data quality audit with health scoring

data-enrichment.description: Enrich records with missing data from multiple sources

anomaly-detection.description: Detect data quality anomalies and mismatches

web-title-domain-resolution.description: For unmatched email domains, fetch homepage title to derive company name, then match against SFDC Account.Name as final fallback

flow-metadata-via-tooling-rest-api.displayName: Flow Metadata via Tooling REST API
flow-metadata-via-tooling-rest-api.description: When hooks block sf project retrieve on production, use curl with [COMPANY] [TOKEN] to query Flow.Metadata via Tooling API REST endpoint. Returns full flow definition including start trigger, decisions, record updates, and lookups as JSON.

textarea-field-usage-analysis.description: Query all records without WHERE, analyze client-side for population rate, content patterns, owner distribution, and sample values

fireflies-transcript-action-item-extract.description: Query Fireflies GraphQL API with split queries (metadata separate from summary/sentences) to avoid auth_failed errors, then extract action items by participant

large-json-analysis-via-bash+node.description: When Read tool exceeds token limit on large JSON results, use Bash with inline node -e to parse, aggregate, and summarize data

apostrophe-safe-soql-dedup.description: Split names with apostrophes into separate exact-match query using heredoc with [COMPANY] escaping rather than LIKE wildcards

full-picture-backfill-csv.description: Generate backfill review CSVs with [COMPANY]_Field and Backfill_Field columns side-by-side so reviewer can see what's already populated vs what's being filled in

hubspot-v4-batch-association-export.description: Use POST /crm/v4/associations/{fromObjectType}/{toObjectType}/batch/read with batches of 500 IDs to efficiently export all associations for a contact list, then hydrate with v3 batch read for properties

cross-platform-id-matching-via-custom-fi.displayName: Cross-Platform ID Matching via Custom Field
cross-platform-id-matching-via-custom-fi.description: When no native HubSpot-SF sync exists, use a custom field (HubSpot_Company_ID__c) on SF Account to build a cross-reference map for enrichment

campaignmember-based-post-import-record-.description: For post-import operations on event leads, query [SFDC_ID] to get SF record IDs rather than re-querying by email. Match back to spreadsheet by SF email first, then FirstName+LastName.

dual-endpoint-hubspot-workflow-audit.description: Query V4 for workflow enumeration, V3 for accurate enabled status, merge by ID to get true active count

cross-event-pattern-research.description: When user references a prior event (e.g., VMX), use Explore agent to find equivalent patterns in that event's data directory before implementing for the current event

fireflies-field-batched-query-pattern.description: Split Fireflies GraphQL transcript queries into separate calls for metadata, summary, and sentences to avoid auth_failed errors

campaign-influence-multi-touch-combinati.description: Pull CampaignInfluence detail records, group by OpportunityId to build campaign sets, then count combination frequencies with associated deal metrics. Requires client-side processing due to SOQL semi-join limitations.

accounthistory-dual-record-filtering.description: AccountHistory Owner changes create paired records (User IDs + display names). Filter to User ID records only using regex ^005[a-zA-Z0-9]{12,15}$ pattern.

batched-history-export-for-50k+-records.description: When AccountHistory exceeds [N] records, batch by date ranges using GROUP BY CALENDAR_YEAR/CALENDAR_MONTH to plan splits under 50K each.

merged-account-history-forensics.description: Use --all-rows flag when querying *History objects for merged/deleted records. Combine survivor + non-survivor timelines. Resolve user IDs. Cross-reference with pre-merge backups.

territory2-regular-soql-pattern.description: Territory2 objects ([SFDC_ID], Territory2, ObjectTerritory2AssignmentRule, RuleTerritory2Association) are queryable via regular SOQL API, not Tooling API. Field names differ from [COMPANY] API docs.

targeted-reference-data-export.description: For large orgs (>[N] records), use targeted queries (email IN, LastName IN, Name IN) instead of broad state-based exports. Pre-flight field population check determines strategy.

lightning-url-to-org-alias-resolution.displayName: Lightning URL to Org Alias Resolution
lightning-url-to-org-alias-resolution.description: Parse subdomain from [COMPANY] URL, fuzzy match against sf org list aliases

gong-scorecard-object-discovery.description: When building Gong-related reports, first discover Gong custom objects via sf sobject list and describe Gong__Gong_Scorecard__c. Use SOQL GROUP BY with [COMPANY]() on Gong__Scorecard_Question_Answer_Score__c WHERE Is_Overall = true for per-AM quality averages.

product-line-account-classification-via-.displayName: Product Line Account Classification via Opportunity RecordType
product-line-account-classification-via-.description: When accounts don't have product line fields, derive classification from [COMPANY] RecordType associations. Query all opps with target RecordType, extract unique AccountIds, build lookup map.

non-aggregate-soql-dedup-pattern.description: For GROUP BY queries exceeding sf CLI batch limits (EXCEEDED_ID_LIMIT), switch to non-aggregate SELECT with [COMPANY] set() deduplication. Avoids queryMore() limitation on aggregate queries.

bulk-flow-metadata-retrieve-and-search.displayName: Bulk Flow Metadata Retrieve and Search
bulk-flow-metadata-retrieve-and-search.description: Use 'sf project retrieve start --metadata Flow --output-dir' to bulk-retrieve all org flows, then grep across the XML files for specific action patterns. Much faster than querying each flow individually via API.

cross-reference-backfill-impact-analysis.description: Extract IDs from pre-backfill snapshot, batch-query current state from [COMPANY], filter for records where the backfilled field transitioned from null to populated, output as impacted CSV

prior-session-artifact-discovery.description: Search workspace orgs directory and reports directory for artifacts from previous sessions using Glob patterns, then cross-reference with [COMPANY] tasks for full context

dynamic-dashboard-detection-via-soql-typ.displayName: Dynamic Dashboard Detection via SOQL Type Field
dynamic-dashboard-detection-via-soql-typ.description: Use WHERE Type = 'LoggedInUser' on Dashboard SOQL to identify dashboards running as logged-in user, rather than checking for null RunningUser

batch-soql-excel-enrichment.description: Read Excel IDs -> batch SOQL query with [COMPANY] IN (200 max) -> map results -> openpyxl cell-by-cell write preserving formatting -> save to new file

tooling-api-flow-inventory.description: Use Tooling API Flow object (not FlowDefinition or [SFDC_ID]) with [COMPANY].DeveloperName for comprehensive flow inventory

ruleterritory2association-mapping.description: Use RuleTerritory2Association SOQL to get definitive rule-to-territory mapping instead of parsing XML filenames or guessing from [COMPANY]

windowed-bulk-export-for-full-database.displayName: Windowed Bulk Export for Full Database
